    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<Replacement>
    ReplacementReader.read(String path, String charsetName)
    Reads all configured regex replacements from the given classpath resource.
    static List<Replacement>
    ReplacementReader.read(String path, String charsetName, boolean regex)
    Reads all configured replacements from the given classpath resource using the requested replacement mode.
    static List<Replacement>
    ReplacementReader.read(String path, String charsetName, boolean regex, String category)
    Reads all configured replacements from the given classpath resource and optionally filters them by category from the third CSV column.
